message:
feat(web): add BenchmarkHistoryChart component and utilities

Implements the Benchmark History Time-Series Chart (bead sce) with:
- BenchmarkHistoryChart component using Recharts
- useSpeedScoreHistory hook with pagination support
- Chart data transformation utilities with LTTB downsampling
- Date range presets (24h, 7d, 30d, 90d, All)
- Component score breakdown toggle
- Interactive tooltips with exact values
- Unit tests for chart utilities
- Vitest test runner configuration

The chart displays SpeedScore history over time with support for
toggling individual component scores (CPU, Memory, Disk, Network,
Compilation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
